title: Reveal Current AGV Faults From The Summary Area Drop-Down
summary: Use the small drop-down in the Map Monitor summary area to expose current AGV fault or error information when the fault area is hidden.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when working in the Map Monitor summary area and current AGV faults may be present but the fault area is hidden. The source states that when a current fault needs to be addressed, it will show up in this drop-down area and can be viewed by clicking the drop-down menu.
not_for: Determining fault causes not shown in the interface
Performing recovery actions not stated in the source

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Open the summary-area drop-down and view the current AGV errors shown by the HMI.

safety_notes: This source supports viewing current AGV faults only.
Do not invent fault causes or recovery actions not stated in the source.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the map monitor summary area
Fault drop-down control on the HMI

access_required: Access to the Map Monitor summary area
system_preconditions: The user is viewing the Map Monitor summary area
A current AGV fault may be present in the summary area

visual_references.description: Map Monitor summary area showing the small drop-down used to display AGV faults and related summary indicators.

steps.title: Locate the summary-area fault drop-down
steps.purpose: Identify the control used to reveal current AGV faults in the Map Monitor summary area.
steps.instruction: In the Map Monitor summary area, locate the small drop-down associated with AGV faults.
steps.expected_result: The small drop-down control for AGV faults is identified in the summary area.
steps.healthy_condition: The drop-down is visible or its location in the summary area is clearly identified.
steps.failure_condition: The operator cannot identify the AGV fault drop-down in the summary area.

actions.label: Find AGV fault drop-down
actions.exact_action: Locate the small drop-down in the map monitor summary area.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The map monitor summary area and the small drop-down used to show AGV faults.

stop_or_escalate_if: The summary-area AGV fault drop-down cannot be located.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: There's a small drop down here.

steps.title: Open the drop-down if the fault area is hidden
steps.purpose: Expand the hidden fault area so current AGV errors can be displayed.
steps.instruction: If the fault area is hidden, click the drop-down menu to expand it.
steps.healthy_condition: The drop-down opens and the AGV fault area becomes visible.
steps.failure_condition: The drop-down does not open or no fault area becomes visible after clicking it.

actions.label: Expand fault drop-down
actions.exact_action: If the fault area is hidden, click the drop-down menu to expand it.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The small drop-down in the summary area that can be clicked to reveal current AGV faults.

stop_or_escalate_if: A current fault is suspected but the drop-down does not reveal any error details.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Sometimes this is hidden, but if you have a current fault that needs to be addressed, it will show up here... you click that drop down menu

steps.title: View the displayed AGV errors
steps.purpose: Read the current fault or error entries shown by the expanded summary area.
steps.instruction: View the current fault or error entries shown in the expanded area.
steps.expected_result: Current AGV errors are visible in the expanded drop-down area.
steps.healthy_condition: The expanded area shows the current fault or error information that needs attention.
steps.failure_condition: No error entries appear even though a current fault is suspected.

actions.label: Inspect visible errors
actions.exact_action: View the current fault or error entries shown in the expanded area.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The expanded summary-area fault section where current AGV errors are shown.

stop_or_escalate_if: A current fault is suspected but no error details appear after opening the drop-down.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: you will be able to see the errors.

steps.title: Record the visible errors
steps.purpose: Capture the displayed AGV fault information for follow-up or escalation.
steps.instruction: Record the visible errors that need to be addressed.
steps.expected_result: The visible AGV errors are documented for follow-up.
steps.healthy_condition: The operator has captured the displayed error information without adding unsupported interpretation.
steps.failure_condition: The errors cannot be captured because no details are shown, or unsupported causes/actions are added.

actions.label: Document visible errors
actions.exact_action: Record the visible errors that need to be addressed.

stop_or_escalate_if: No error details are available to record after opening the drop-down.
Additional diagnosis or recovery is needed beyond what is shown in the source.

source_evidence.text: The user can expose and view current AGV fault or error information from the summary area.
Escalate if a current fault is suspected but no error details appear after opening the drop-down.
Do not invent fault causes or recovery actions not stated in the source.

success_criteria: The small summary-area drop-down is located.
The drop-down is opened when the fault area is hidden.
Current AGV fault or error entries are visible in the expanded area.
Visible errors are recorded for follow-up.
healthy_conditions: The summary-area drop-down can be identified and opened.
Current AGV errors appear in the expanded area when present.
The operator can view the errors without performing unsupported recovery actions.
failure_conditions: The AGV fault drop-down cannot be located.
The drop-down does not reveal the fault area.
A current fault is suspected but no error details appear after opening the drop-down.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if a current fault is suspected but no error details appear after opening the drop-down.
Escalate for diagnosis or recovery beyond viewing the displayed errors, because the source does not provide fault-cause or recovery steps.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Map Monitor summary area with the small AGV fault drop-down.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: There's a small drop down here. Sometimes this is hidden, but if you have a current fault that needs to be addressed, it will show up here... you click that drop down menu and you will be able to see the errors.

missing_details: The source does not provide exact UI labels for the drop-down control.
The source does not provide fault resolution or recovery steps.
The source does not provide a required documentation destination or recording format.
The source does not provide time estimates for completing this procedure.
